feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: TikTok లో పెట్టుబడుల దిశగా Reliance Industries తో ByteDance చర్చలు, టిక్‌టాక్‌ కోసం దిగ్గజ కంపెనీలు!

link.title: TikTok లో పెట్టుబడుల దిశగా Reliance Industries తో ByteDance చర్చలు, టిక్‌టాక్‌ కోసం దిగ్గజ కంపెనీలు!

entry.content:
China’s ByteDance is in talks with Reliance Industries Ltd for an investment in its video-based app TikTok’s business in India, according to the report.
#TikTokinindia
#RelianceIndustriesinvestmentinTikTok
#ByteDanceRelianceIndustriesLtdtalks
#RelianceIndustriesinvestmentTikTokinIndia
#TikTokinUS
#DonaldTrump
#MicrosofttoBuyTikTok
#TikTokMicrosoftdeal
#MukeshAmbani
#ChineseApps
#ChinaByteDance
#chinaapps
#TikTokvideos
#59MobileApps
#PUBG
#టిక్ టాక్
చైనాకు చెందిన దిగ్గజ టెక్ కంపెనీలు తయారు చేసిన పలు యాప్‌లపైనా భారత్ వేటు వేసింది. చైనా యాప్‌లను నిషేధించింది. టిక్‌టాక్, షేర్ ఇట్, యూసీ బ్రౌజర్ వంటి 59 రకాల యాప్‌లను వినియోగానికి బ్రేక్ వేసింది.
entry.summary: China’s ByteDance is in talks with Reliance Industries Ltd for an investment in its video-based app TikTok’s business in India, according to the report. #TikTokinindia #RelianceIndustriesinvestmentinTikTok #ByteDanceRelianceIndustriesLtdtalks #RelianceIndustriesinvestmentTikTokinIndia #TikTokinUS #DonaldTrump #MicrosofttoBuyTikTok #TikTokMicrosoftdeal #MukeshAmbani #ChineseApps #ChinaByteDance #chinaapps #TikTokvideos #59MobileApps #PUBG #టిక్ టాక్ చైనాకు చెందిన దిగ్గజ టెక్ కంపెనీలు తయారు చేసిన పలు యాప్‌లపైనా భారత్ వేటు వేసింది. చైనా యాప్‌లను నిషేధించింది. టిక్‌టాక్, షేర్ ఇట్, యూసీ బ్రౌజర్ వంటి 59 రకాల యాప్‌లను వినియోగానికి బ్రేక్ వేసింది.

entry.title: AVENGER DOGS movie (2020)

link.title: AVENGER DOGS movie (2020)

entry.content: AVENGER DOGS movie trailer (2020) - Plot synopsis: When the universe’s highest-flying dogs warp into outer space, Skyfetcher and Spaceslobber get a call from canine headquarters! It seems an unknown force is attacking unsuspecting planets, and it’s up to them to root out the source of the trouble!
entry.summary: AVENGER DOGS movie trailer (2020) - Plot synopsis: When the universe’s highest-flying dogs warp into outer space, Skyfetcher and Spaceslobber get a call from canine headquarters! It seems an unknown force is attacking unsuspecting planets, and it’s up to them to root out the source of the trouble!

entry.title: Futurist Reviews Futuristic Movies, from ‘The Matrix’ to ‘WALL-E’

link.title: Futurist Reviews Futuristic Movies, from ‘The Matrix’ to ‘WALL-E’

entry.content:
Futurist Amy Webb fact checks futuristic scenes from movies including ‘Blade Runner 2049,’ ‘Gattaca,’ ‘The Matrix,’ ‘Ex Machina,’ ‘WALL-E,’ ‘2001: A Space Odyssey,’ ‘Total Recall’ and analyzes their probability, craft, and execution.
Check out Amy’s book, "The Big Nine: How the Tech Titans and Their Thinking Machines Could Warp Humanity" — in stores now!
entry.summary: Futurist Amy Webb fact checks futuristic scenes from movies including ‘Blade Runner 2049,’ ‘Gattaca,’ ‘The Matrix,’ ‘Ex Machina,’ ‘WALL-E,’ ‘2001: A Space Odyssey,’ ‘Total Recall’ and analyzes their probability, craft, and execution. Check out Amy’s book, "The Big Nine: How the Tech Titans and Their Thinking Machines Could Warp Humanity" — in stores now!

entry.title: Stone Van Brooken - The Way You Are (Ft. Tyler Sjöström)

link.title: Stone Van Brooken - The Way You Are (Ft. Tyler Sjöström)

entry.content:
Joyful music that comforts your senses, makes work environments more
enjoyable with each track on the console motivating you to give your
best effort.Incredibly energizing.
entry.summary: Joyful music that comforts your senses, makes work environments more enjoyable with each track on the console motivating you to give your best effort.Incredibly energizing.

entry.title: MS Dhoni retires: Sachin Tendulkar to Ashwin, reactions on MS Dhoni वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: MS Dhoni retires: Sachin Tendulkar to Ashwin, reactions on MS Dhoni वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Sachin Tendulkar to Ashwin,know reactions on Dhoni, MS Dhoni announces retirement. legend of the Indian cricket team, MS Dhoni, whose finest hour was to captain India to their second ODI World Cup title in 2011 on home soil, announced his retirement from the international game on August 15.Dhoni, who will lead the Chennai Super Kings into battle in the upcoming IPL in UAE, posted a video on Instagram announcing his decision.Why Dhoni announces retirement on 15 august.
भारत के दिग्‍गज विकेटकीपर बल्‍लेबाज एमएस धोनी ने इंटरनेशनल क्रिकेट को अलविदा कह दिया है, धोनी ने 15 अगस्त को 2020 को अपने इंस्टाग्राम अंकाउट पर एक वीडियो पोस्ट कर क्रिकेट को अलविदा कह दिया, साक्षी धोनी ने भी इस वीडियो को लाइक किया और कमेंट भी किया, आपको बतां दें धोनी 14 अगस्त को ही चैन्नई के लिए रवाना हुए थे, और चेन्नई जाके उन्होने क्रिकेट को हमेशा के लिए अलविदा कह दिया। आइये जानते है धोनी के संन्यास पर क्रिकेट जगत के सितारों के साथ-साथ बाकी लोगों ने क्या कहा
#MSDhoni #MSDhoniretirement #Dhoniretires
entry.summary: Sachin Tendulkar to Ashwin,know reactions on Dhoni, MS Dhoni announces retirement. legend of the Indian cricket team, MS Dhoni, whose finest hour was to captain India to their second ODI World Cup title in 2011 on home soil, announced his retirement from the international game on August 15.Dhoni, who will lead the Chennai Super Kings into battle in the upcoming IPL in UAE, posted a video on Instagram announcing his decision.Why Dhoni announces retirement on 15 august. भारत के दिग्‍गज विकेटकीपर बल्‍लेबाज एमएस धोनी ने इंटरनेशनल क्रिकेट को अलविदा कह दिया है, धोनी ने 15 अगस्त को 2020 को अपने इंस्टाग्राम अंकाउट पर एक वीडियो पोस्ट कर क्रिकेट को अलविदा कह दिया, साक्षी धोनी ने भी इस वीडियो को लाइक किया और कमेंट भी किया, आपको बतां दें धोनी 14 अगस्त को ही चैन्नई के लिए रवाना हुए थे, और चेन्नई जाके उन्होने क्रिकेट को हमेशा के लिए अलविदा कह दिया। आइये जानते है धोनी के संन्यास पर क्रिकेट जगत के सितारों के साथ-साथ बाकी लोगों ने क्या कहा #MSDhoni #MSDhoniretirement #Dhoniretires

entry.title: Greater Noida Fire : NPCL के सब स्टेशन में लगी भीषण आग, कई सेक्टरों की बत्ती गुल वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Greater Noida Fire : NPCL के सब स्टेशन में लगी भीषण आग, कई सेक्टरों की बत्ती गुल वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
A massive fire broke out on Wednesday at the power house of Noida Power Company Limited located in Sector 148, Greater Noida. The fire took a terrible form on sight. The fire has engulfed many transformers. In the footage surfaced from the scene, it can be seen that the fire is burning and black smoke is spread around. The flames are seen rising.
ग्रेटर नोएडा के सेक्टर 148 स्थित नोएडा पावर कंपनी लिमिटेड के पावर हाउस में बुधवार को भीषण आग लग गई। देखते ही देखते आग ने भयानक रूप ले लिया और कई ट्रांसफॉर्मरों को चपेट में ले लिया. घटनास्थल से सामने आए फुटेज में देखा जा सकता है कि आग धू-धूकर जल रही है और आस-पास काला धुआं फैला हुआ है. आग की लपटें उठती दिखाई दे रही हैं.
#NPCLFire #GreaterNoida #NoidaFire
entry.summary: A massive fire broke out on Wednesday at the power house of Noida Power Company Limited located in Sector 148, Greater Noida. The fire took a terrible form on sight. The fire has engulfed many transformers. In the footage surfaced from the scene, it can be seen that the fire is burning and black smoke is spread around. The flames are seen rising. ग्रेटर नोएडा के सेक्टर 148 स्थित नोएडा पावर कंपनी लिमिटेड के पावर हाउस में बुधवार को भीषण आग लग गई। देखते ही देखते आग ने भयानक रूप ले लिया और कई ट्रांसफॉर्मरों को चपेट में ले लिया. घटनास्थल से सामने आए फुटेज में देखा जा सकता है कि आग धू-धूकर जल रही है और आस-पास काला धुआं फैला हुआ है. आग की लपटें उठती दिखाई दे रही हैं. #NPCLFire #GreaterNoida #NoidaFire

entry.title: Lấy Danh Nghĩa Người Nhà Tập 7 Full VietSub - Phim Hoa Ngữ

entry.content:
Xem phim Trung Quốc Lấy danh nghĩa người nhà tập 7 Vietsub, Lay danh nghia nguoi nha tap 7
Đạo diễn: Đinh Tử Quang
Tên tiếng Anh: Go Ahead
Tên tiếng Trung: 以家人之名
Tên tiếng Việt: Lấy danh nghĩa người nhà
Diễn viên: Đàm Tùng Vận, Tống Uy Long, Trương Tân Thành

entry.title: Squats for the NHS

link.title: Squats for the NHS

entry.content: Pompey personal trainers, Sol and Mosh are raising funds for NHS charities by doing 2000 squats with 80kg on 5 September 2020 at Pure Gym North Harbour
entry.summary: Pompey personal trainers, Sol and Mosh are raising funds for NHS charities by doing 2000 squats with 80kg on 5 September 2020 at Pure Gym North Harbour

entry.title: Coronavirus : les professionnels du tourisme inquiets du départ des Britanniques

link.title: Coronavirus : les professionnels du tourisme inquiets du départ des Britanniques

entry.content:
Les vacanciers britanniques ont massivement quitté la France depuis l’instauration d’une quarantaine par le Royaume-Uni à toute personne entrant dans le pays, samedi 15 août. Les conséquences économiques sont lourdes et nombreuses pour les professionnels du tourisme en France.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Les vacanciers britanniques ont massivement quitté la France depuis l’instauration d’une quarantaine par le Royaume-Uni à toute personne entrant dans le pays, samedi 15 août. Les conséquences économiques sont lourdes et nombreuses pour les professionnels du tourisme en France. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: ‘Lovecraft Country’ dévoile sa bande-annonce

link.title: ‘Lovecraft Country’ dévoile sa bande-annonce

entry.content: Réalisée par Jordan Peele et Misha Green, la série HBO "Lovecraft Country" est disponible à partir du 17 août 2020 sur OCS.
entry.summary: Réalisée par Jordan Peele et Misha Green, la série HBO "Lovecraft Country" est disponible à partir du 17 août 2020 sur OCS.

entry.title: Putin anuncia que Rusia ha ganado la carrera de la vacuna anti-COVID-19

link.title: Putin anuncia que Rusia ha ganado la carrera de la vacuna anti-COVID-19

entry.content:
Moscú (Rusia), 11 ago (EFE).- El presidente de Rusia, Vladímir Putin, anunció este martes que su país ha ganado la carrera mundial por registrar la primera vacuna anti-COVID-19 y aseguró que el preparado desarrollado por los científicos nacionales es eficaz, seguro y genera inmunidad estable ante el nuevo coronavirus.
 
IMÁGENES FACILITADAS POR EL KREMLIN Y DE ARCHIVO.
 
Palabras clave: efe,internacional,rusia,vacuna,covid,nomonetizar
entry.summary: Moscú (Rusia), 11 ago (EFE).- El presidente de Rusia, Vladímir Putin, anunció este martes que su país ha ganado la carrera mundial por registrar la primera vacuna anti-COVID-19 y aseguró que el preparado desarrollado por los científicos nacionales es eficaz, seguro y genera inmunidad estable ante el nuevo coronavirus. IMÁGENES FACILITADAS POR EL KREMLIN Y DE ARCHIVO. Palabras clave: efe,internacional,rusia,vacuna,covid,nomonetizar

entry.title: Bill & Ted Face The Music Orijinal Fragman (2)

link.title: Bill & Ted Face The Music Orijinal Fragman (2)

entry.content: Bill & Ted’s Excellent Adventure ve Bill & Ted’s Bogus Journey filmlerinin uzun yıllar sonrasında tekrar izleyiciyle buluşacak olan ikiliyi bu kez yetişkin bireyler olarak izleyeceğiz. Rock müziğe duydukları tutku ekseninde birlikte birçok deneyimi paylaşan yakın dostlar halen daha arkadaşlıklarını sürdürmektedir. Bill ve Ted bu kez gezegeni kurtarmak için bir şarkı yaratacakları ve sonrasında geleceğe gidip işe yarayıp yaramadığını kontrol edecekleri yeni bir maceraya adım atıyorlar.
entry.summary: Bill & Ted’s Excellent Adventure ve Bill & Ted’s Bogus Journey filmlerinin uzun yıllar sonrasında tekrar izleyiciyle buluşacak olan ikiliyi bu kez yetişkin bireyler olarak izleyeceğiz. Rock müziğe duydukları tutku ekseninde birlikte birçok deneyimi paylaşan yakın dostlar halen daha arkadaşlıklarını sürdürmektedir. Bill ve Ted bu kez gezegeni kurtarmak için bir şarkı yaratacakları ve sonrasında geleceğe gidip işe yarayıp yaramadığını kontrol edecekleri yeni bir maceraya adım atıyorlar.

entry.title: #S8.E4 Wentworth Season 8 Episode 4 ( showcase ) EngSubs HD

link.title: #S8.E4 Wentworth Season 8 Episode 4 ( showcase ) EngSubs HD

entry.content:
Wentworth Season 8 Episode 4
Click Here : [[ ]]
Storyline :
Bea Smith is locked up while awaiting trial for the attempted murder of her husband and must learn how life works in prison. A modern adaptation and sequel of the iconic Prisoner series.
Air Date: 2020-08-25
Genre: Drama, Crime
Network : showcase
Cast: Kate Atkinson (Vera Bennett), Robbie Magasiva (Will Jackson), Kate Jenkinson (Allie Novak), Bernard Curry (Jake Stewart), Jacqueline Brennan (Linda Miles), Pamela Rabe (Joan Ferguson), Katrina Milosevic (Sue "Boomer" Jenkins), Leah Purcell (Rita Connors), Rarriwuy Hick (Ruby Mitchell), Susie Porter (Marie Winter), Kate Box (Lou Kelly), Jane Hall (Ann Reynolds), Zoe Terakes (Reb Keane), David de Lautour (Dr. Greg Miller)
entry.summary: Wentworth Season 8 Episode 4 Click Here : [[ ]] Storyline : Bea Smith is locked up while awaiting trial for the attempted murder of her husband and must learn how life works in prison. A modern adaptation and sequel of the iconic Prisoner series. Air Date: 2020-08-25 Genre: Drama, Crime Network : showcase Cast: Kate Atkinson (Vera Bennett), Robbie Magasiva (Will Jackson), Kate Jenkinson (Allie Novak), Bernard Curry (Jake Stewart), Jacqueline Brennan (Linda Miles), Pamela Rabe (Joan Ferguson), Katrina Milosevic (Sue "Boomer" Jenkins), Leah Purcell (Rita Connors), Rarriwuy Hick (Ruby Mitchell), Susie Porter (Marie Winter), Kate Box (Lou Kelly), Jane Hall (Ann Reynolds), Zoe Terakes (Reb Keane), David de Lautour (Dr. Greg Miller)

entry.title: Trump says he may accept presidential nomination at Gettysburg battlefield

link.title: Trump says he may accept presidential nomination at Gettysburg battlefield

entry.content:
Donald Trump said on Monday that he is considering accepting the Republican presidential nomination later this month with a speech at the civil war battlefield of Gettysburg, one of the most hallowed spots in American history. The move prompted almost instant condemnation from critics. Gettysburg is the site of the bloodiest battle of the US civil war and viewed historically as a turning point for the Union army against the Confederate army defending the slave-owning rebel south. There, in 1863, Abraham Lincoln delivered the Gettysburg Address, a speech carved into the walls of his presidential memorial on the Washington Mall. The prospect of Trump delivering his own speech on the battlefield, after repeatedly defending the use of Confederate symbols and monuments during a period of civil unrest linked to racial justice protests, was met with derision from his critics.“Trump speaking at Gettysburg?” tweeted Bill Kristol, a Republican critic of Trump. “The good news: 1. The prospect is more ludicrous than sickening. 2. The presumptuousness of the choice of location will backfire. 3. The world will little note, nor long remember what Trump says there.”Presidential candidates traditionally deliver their remarks on the final night of a weeks-long nominating convention, in front of a raucous crowd of thousands of the party faithful. Plans for this year’s party conventions have been upended by the coronavirus pandemic, forcing both candidates to reimagine these events without the usual pomp and circumstance. Trump said he was mulling two options: Gettysburg and the White House.“We have narrowed the Presidential Nomination Acceptance Speech, to be delivered on the final night of the Convention (Thursday), to two locations - The Great Battlefield of Gettysburg, Pennsylvania, and the White House, Washington, D. C.” Trump wrote on Twitter, regarding his remarks at the Republican national convention on 27 August. But delivering his speech from the White House would also be highly controversial and possibly against the law. It would mark an unprecedented use of federal property for partisan political purposes.
All data is taken from the source:
Article Link:
#trump #kaieteurnews #oann #news #nytimes #cnn #newsnow
entry.summary: Donald Trump said on Monday that he is considering accepting the Republican presidential nomination later this month with a speech at the civil war battlefield of Gettysburg, one of the most hallowed spots in American history. The move prompted almost instant condemnation from critics. Gettysburg is the site of the bloodiest battle of the US civil war and viewed historically as a turning point for the Union army against the Confederate army defending the slave-owning rebel south. There, in 1863, Abraham Lincoln delivered the Gettysburg Address, a speech carved into the walls of his presidential memorial on the Washington Mall. The prospect of Trump delivering his own speech on the battlefield, after repeatedly defending the use of Confederate symbols and monuments during a period of civil unrest linked to racial justice protests, was met with derision from his critics.“Trump speaking at Gettysburg?” tweeted Bill Kristol, a Republican critic of Trump. “The good news: 1. The prospect is more ludicrous than sickening. 2. The presumptuousness of the choice of location will backfire. 3. The world will little note, nor long remember what Trump says there.”Presidential candidates traditionally deliver their remarks on the final night of a weeks-long nominating convention, in front of a raucous crowd of thousands of the party faithful. Plans for this year’s party conventions have been upended by the coronavirus pandemic, forcing both candidates to reimagine these events without the usual pomp and circumstance. Trump said he was mulling two options: Gettysburg and the White House.“We have narrowed the Presidential Nomination Acceptance Speech, to be delivered on the final night of the Convention (Thursday), to two locations - The Great Battlefield of Gettysburg, Pennsylvania, and the White House, Washington, D. C.” Trump wrote on Twitter, regarding his remarks at the Republican national convention on 27 August. But delivering his speech from the White House would also be highly controversial and possibly against the law. It would mark an unprecedented use of federal property for partisan political purposes. All data is taken from the source: Article Link: #trump #kaieteurnews #oann #news #nytimes #cnn #newsnow

entry.title: Olivia Culpo Gives A Tour Of Her Fridge

link.title: Olivia Culpo Gives A Tour Of Her Fridge

entry.content: Model Olivia Culpo opens up about all of the jars of pickles and assortment of chocolate she keeps in her refrigerator in the latest episode of "Fridge Tours."
entry.summary: Model Olivia Culpo opens up about all of the jars of pickles and assortment of chocolate she keeps in her refrigerator in the latest episode of "Fridge Tours."

entry.title: Arrivé à Beyrouth, comment le ‘Tonnerre’ va venir en aide à la reconstruction

link.title: Arrivé à Beyrouth, comment le ‘Tonnerre’ va venir en aide à la reconstruction

entry.content: Le "Tonnerre" est arrivé ce vendredi matin à Beyrouth, au Liban, avec à son bord 700 militaires français et plusieurs tonnes de fret. Envoyé par la France, il est venu pour aider aux opérations de déblaiement de la capitale libanaise.
entry.summary: Le "Tonnerre" est arrivé ce vendredi matin à Beyrouth, au Liban, avec à son bord 700 militaires français et plusieurs tonnes de fret. Envoyé par la France, il est venu pour aider aux opérations de déblaiement de la capitale libanaise.

entry.title: Niger: des Français et leurs guides tués par des hommes armés (5 5) - 09 08

link.title: Niger: des Français et leurs guides tués par des hommes armés (5 5) - 09 08

entry.content:
L’Élysée a confirmé ce dimanche soir la mort de Français dans l’attaque d’un véhicule touristique à Kouré au Niger. Selon le gouverneur de la région, les assaillants se seraient rendus dans la zone à moto et auraient abattu les personnes présentes dans la voiture. Emmanuel Macron s’est entretenu avec son homologue nigérien Mahamadou Issoufou. Pour en parler: Alexandre Chauveau, notre journaliste en duplex depuis le ministère des Affaires étrangères (Paris). Dominique Rizet, consultant police-justice à BFMTV. Et Anne Saurat-Dubois, journaliste politique à BFMTV. - Week-end direct, du dimanche 09 août 2020, présenté par Kelly Laffin et Lionel Top, sur BFMTV.
Les vendredis, samedis et dimanches, "Week-end direct" est le rendez-vous d’actualité des soirées du week-end sur BFMTV. Timothée Maymon et Fanny Wegscheider vous proposent un tour complet de l’actualité en compagnie d’invités et des envoyés spéciaux de BFMTV.
BFMTV, 1ère chaine d’information en continu de France, vous propose toute l’info en temps réel avec 18h d’antenne live par jour et des directs partout à travers le monde où l’actualité le nécessite. BFMTV, c’est aussi les débats et les grands reportages d’actualité. Retrouvez BFMTV sur le canal 15 de la TNT et sur BFMTV.com.
entry.summary: L’Élysée a confirmé ce dimanche soir la mort de Français dans l’attaque d’un véhicule touristique à Kouré au Niger. Selon le gouverneur de la région, les assaillants se seraient rendus dans la zone à moto et auraient abattu les personnes présentes dans la voiture. Emmanuel Macron s’est entretenu avec son homologue nigérien Mahamadou Issoufou. Pour en parler: Alexandre Chauveau, notre journaliste en duplex depuis le ministère des Affaires étrangères (Paris). Dominique Rizet, consultant police-justice à BFMTV. Et Anne Saurat-Dubois, journaliste politique à BFMTV. - Week-end direct, du dimanche 09 août 2020, présenté par Kelly Laffin et Lionel Top, sur BFMTV. Les vendredis, samedis et dimanches, "Week-end direct" est le rendez-vous d’actualité des soirées du week-end sur BFMTV. Timothée Maymon et Fanny Wegscheider vous proposent un tour complet de l’actualité en compagnie d’invités et des envoyés spéciaux de BFMTV. BFMTV, 1ère chaine d’information en continu de France, vous propose toute l’info en temps réel avec 18h d’antenne live par jour et des directs partout à travers le monde où l’actualité le nécessite. BFMTV, c’est aussi les débats et les grands reportages d’actualité. Retrouvez BFMTV sur le canal 15 de la TNT et sur BFMTV.com.

entry.title: Shivraj Singh Chauhan का ऐलान, Madhya Pradesh वालों को मिलेंगी की Government Jobs वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Shivraj Singh Chauhan का ऐलान, Madhya Pradesh वालों को मिलेंगी की Government Jobs वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
The Madhya Pradesh government took a major decision on Tuesday to prevent people from other states from getting government jobs. Chief Minister Shivraj Singh Chauhan announced that only the youth of Madhya Pradesh will get government jobs, they will take legal steps for this. Applicants from other states will not be given preference in any type of government job
अन्य राज्यों के लोगों को सरकारी नौकरी से रोकने के लिए मध्य प्रदेश सरकार ने मंगलवार को एक बड़ा फैसला लिया. मुख्यमंत्री शिवराज सिंह चौहान ने ऐलान किया कि केवल मध्य प्रदेश के युवाओं को सरकारी नौकरियां मिलें, इसके लिए कानूनी कदम उठाएंगे. दूसरे राज्यों के आवेदकों को किसी तरह की सरकारी नौकरी में तरजीह नहीं दी जाएगी
#ShivrajSingh #MadhyaPradesh #oneindiahindi
entry.summary: The Madhya Pradesh government took a major decision on Tuesday to prevent people from other states from getting government jobs. Chief Minister Shivraj Singh Chauhan announced that only the youth of Madhya Pradesh will get government jobs, they will take legal steps for this. Applicants from other states will not be given preference in any type of government job अन्य राज्यों के लोगों को सरकारी नौकरी से रोकने के लिए मध्य प्रदेश सरकार ने मंगलवार को एक बड़ा फैसला लिया. मुख्यमंत्री शिवराज सिंह चौहान ने ऐलान किया कि केवल मध्य प्रदेश के युवाओं को सरकारी नौकरियां मिलें, इसके लिए कानूनी कदम उठाएंगे. दूसरे राज्यों के आवेदकों को किसी तरह की सरकारी नौकरी में तरजीह नहीं दी जाएगी #ShivrajSingh #MadhyaPradesh #oneindiahindi

entry.title: Best Modern Retro Motorcycles 2020

link.title: Best Modern Retro Motorcycles 2020

entry.content: Modern classics, retro revivals. There is a whole segment of motorcycles these days that look to the past for inspiration. These are some of our favorites.
entry.summary: Modern classics, retro revivals. There is a whole segment of motorcycles these days that look to the past for inspiration. These are some of our favorites.

entry.title: NEWS: ECM Libra Foundation extends RM3 mil in Covid-19 aid

link.title: NEWS: ECM Libra Foundation extends RM3 mil in Covid-19 aid

entry.content: The ECM Libra Foundation has set aside RM3mil for its Covid-19 Food Aid Programme for KL’s urban poor. Science, Technology and Innovation Minister Khairy Jamaludin, who helped to distribute the cooked meals during Friday’s run, says he will take the matter up to various ministries to ensure that more is done to assist the community.
entry.summary: The ECM Libra Foundation has set aside RM3mil for its Covid-19 Food Aid Programme for KL’s urban poor. Science, Technology and Innovation Minister Khairy Jamaludin, who helped to distribute the cooked meals during Friday’s run, says he will take the matter up to various ministries to ensure that more is done to assist the community.
